title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Queen, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You old HAG! Just who do you thi-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck is with that old lady?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's not just some old lady!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Give me your Oshiruko, you pesky lizard!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Lord Queen! Please, hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoaoag- ghh! Look what she's done to a 1.3 billion belli bounty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She laid him out with just two hits!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's on a different level! This is really is big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "cell that is not to be unlocked" has been busted wide open!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even know what's supposed to be in there, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: whatever it is, it should be handcuffed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whatever was in there's probably long dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Babanuki! Can we shoot it! That thing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't provoke her, Dalfugo! What did Lord Kaido say?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chief, that's the thing! The snail can't communicate anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one can get in touch with Onigashima!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
